---
date: "2021-05-05T00:00:00+01:00"
draft: False
menu:
  log_all:
    parent: 6 - Localização e redes logísticas
    weight: 13
title: Redes logísticas
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 70
output: 
  blogdown::html_page:
    toc: true
type: docs
weight: 16
---

Em elaboração

<hr>
